articles.title: Did You Know Your Brain Has a Secret Third Eye?
articles.summary: Scientists discovered that all vertebrates, including humans, came from an ancient one-eyed ancestor. That single eye turned into the pineal gland deep in your brain!

articles.title: Are AI Chatbots Telling Teens to Eat Way Too Little?
articles.summary: A new study found that AI chatbots created meal plans for teens that were way too low in calories—almost a whole meal's worth less than a dietitian's plan. That could be dangerous for growing kids.

articles.title: Want to Think Better? Don't Ask AI for Help Right Away!
articles.summary: A study found that people who tried solving a problem on their own before using an AI chatbot did better at critical thinking. But if you're in a rush, using AI early can help you finish faster.
